issues.description: Condition should check for 3+ Characters on board, not just presence of Characters. HasCardOnBoard needs a count parameter or threshold.
Trigger should be 'OnPlay' (card enters play and effect resolves), not 'Activated' (which implies a manual activation cost).
Duration should be 'Permanent' (static effect while condition is met), not 'EndOfTurn'. This is a continuous power boost conditional on board state.
